raw_consumer_statement:
I am submitting this complaint regarding the handling of a billing dispute by Citibank related to a {$2800.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XX/XX/year>. 

This dispute appears to have been denied solely on procedural grounds despite my repeated good-faith efforts to cooperate, provide documentation, and comply with all requests made by the bank. 

Citis denial letter states that a request for additional documentation was sent on XX/XX/year>. I never received this letter. Because I was unaware that additional information was requested, I had no opportunity to respond within the timeframe Citi now claims applies. This communication failure was outside of my control. 

During the dispute process, I regularly monitored my account through the Citi mobile app and actively searched for a way to upload supporting documentation. No upload option or clear submission path was available. I made reasonable efforts to provide information through the channels available to me and submitted documentation as soon as I became aware it was needed. 

XXXX final response indicates the dispute is being denied because my documentation was received after an internal deadline, not because the merits of the dispute were fully evaluated. Denying a consumers claim due to a communication issue especially where the consumer did not receive a request and had no functional method to submit documents within the app raises serious concerns about fairness and transparency in the dispute process. 

I respectfully request that Citi : XXXX. XXXX an executive-level review of this dispute. 
XXXX. Reevaluate the claim based on the substance of the dispute rather than procedural timing caused by communication failures. 
XXXX. Provide clear explanation of how consumers are expected to submit additional documentation when no upload capability exists in the app interface. 
XXXX. Confirm what safeguards are in place to ensure consumers actually receive critical requests before their rights are time-barred. 

I have acted in good faith throughout this process and expect equal good-faith handling from the company. I am requesting regulatory assistance to ensure a fair review and resolution.
